notes: Launcher actions are now visible in the main launcher window, including Backup local data and Backup and open update hub.
Default local app theme now matches the Pathmark download page and launcher.
00_System is no longer imported as an Area.
Imported Areas now receive valid Google Calendar colours instead of falling back to Graphite.
Pathmark creates a README in the selected workspace explaining numbered Area folders and the update-safe folder model.
Export confirmation messages now point users to the visible Open exports folder button.
